Name: FNetDriverDefinition
Description:
Container for describing various types of netdrivers available to the engine
  The engine will try to construct a netdriver of a given type and, failing that,
  the fallback version.

Variables.Name: DefName
Variables.Description: Unique name of this net driver definition

Variables.Name: DriverClassName
Variables.Description: Class name of primary net driver

Variables.Name: DriverClassNameFallback
Variables.Description: Class name of the fallback net driver if the main net driver class fails to initialize
